---
name: TT issue template
about: 'Template for new issues '
title: Development/Design/Support/Testing
labels: ''

---

**Description**
_[Provide detailed description of the issue such as background context, priority, teams affected, and key stakeholders and requirements.]_

**Scope**
_[Detail the scope of work including dependencies (if any), complexity, and importantly time frame of expected go-live. Also include the expected support and deliverables from the tech team.]_ 

**Outcome**
_[Detailed representation of the expected result from the issue.]_
